name: chart_create
description: Create a chart image (bar, line, pie, or scatter) from JSON data

parameters.name: chart_type
parameters.description: Type of chart: bar, line, pie, or scatter

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: JSON string with chart data. For bar/line/scatter: {"labels": [...], "values": [...]}. For pie: {"labels": [...], "values": [...]}

parameters.name: output_path
parameters.description: File path to save the chart image (e.g. chart.png)
